summary: Adjusted the chapter's opening and closing seam so it hands off more cleanly to the adjacent chapters without changing the chapter's core beats.
edits: Rewrote the opening to anchor on Gavin's painful climb back toward the seventh floor instead of repeating the neighboring chapter's same three-day temporal scaffold.
Kept the three-day delay, injury context, and catalogue fixation intact while folding them into the revised opening paragraph sequence.
Added a brief closing beat establishing that Gavin knows he will need to risk showing someone a single page, which bridges into chapter 4's page-selection opening.
